published.title: Published Services
published.selectWorkflow: Select a workflow from the list

kb.title: Knowledge Bases
kb.createFirst: Create your first knowledge base to get started.
kb.settingsImmutableHint: Embedding model, chunk size, and overlap cannot be changed after creation.
kb.confirmDelete: Delete knowledge base "{{name}}"? All files and indexed data will be removed.
kb.confirmDeleteFile: Delete file "{{name}}"? Its indexed chunks will be removed from the knowledge base.
kb.chunkFixedHint: Split by character count with overlap. Works for any document.
kb.chunkStructuralHint: Split by headings and paragraphs. Best for Markdown, HTML, and structured documents.
kb.testPlaceholder: Enter a question to test retrieval...
kb.uploadFirst: Upload files first to test retrieval.
kb.urlPlaceholder: Enter URL to add to knowledge base...

dialog.saveAsTemplate: Save as Template — enter a name:

tester.responseHint: // Send a test to see the response

logs.noLogs: No logs found for this time range.
logs.empty: No logs found for this time range.

services.noPublished: No published services yet. Publish a workflow from the Studio.

apiKeys.noKeys: No API keys yet. Create one to enable external access.
apiKeys.empty: No API keys yet. Create one to enable external access.
apiKeys.confirmRevoke: Revoke this API key? It will no longer be accepted.
apiKeys.createdBanner: API Key created! Copy it now — it will not be shown again.
apiKeys.usageDesc: Include the API key in request headers:
apiKeys.usageBearer: Or use {{header}} header. Agent Card discovery endpoints (GET) remain public.

middlewareConfig.title: Middleware Configuration
middlewareConfig.enableFirst: Enable this middleware to configure it.
middlewareConfig.selectOne: Select a middleware from the list.

guardrails.scanAllMessagesHelp: Scan all user messages, not just the last one (recommended for multi-turn safety)
guardrails.scanOutputHelp: Also scan AI responses for blocked content
guardrails.injectionDetectionHelp: Detect common prompt injection patterns (e.g., 'ignore previous instructions')
guardrails.blockedTermsHelp: Comma-separated keywords that will block the request
guardrails.warnTermsHelp: Comma-separated keywords that log a warning but allow through
guardrails.regexRulesHelp: One regex pattern per line (blocks matching content)
guardrails.allowedTopicsHelp: Restrict agent to only discuss these topics (comma-separated). Leave empty for no restriction.
guardrails.blockedResponseHelp: Custom message returned when content is blocked

pii.modeHelp: Irreversible replaces PII with fixed text. Reversible uses typed tokens that can be restored in the response.
pii.confidenceHelp: Only mask PII with confidence above this value (0.0-1.0)
pii.localesHelp: Select which regional PII patterns to detect
pii.localeGlobal: Global (Email, IP, Credit Card, IBAN, URL, Crypto...)
pii.localeTW: Taiwan (ID Card, Phone, Tax ID, NHI Card, Address)
pii.localeJP: Japan (My Number, Phone, Passport, Driver License)
pii.scanOutputHelp: Also scan and protect PII in the AI response
pii.replacementHelp: Text to replace PII with (irreversible mode only)

skillPicker.title: Select Skills
skillPicker.empty: No skills available. Create one in the Skills page.

console.title: Console
console.empty: No execution logs yet. Run a workflow to see events here.

export.title: Export Project
export.jsonDesc: Export workflow definition. Use with Engine DLL to build your own host.
export.projectDesc: Complete .NET project with Program.cs, appsettings.json, Dockerfile. Ready to dotnet run.
export.teamsDesc: M365 Agents SDK bot for Microsoft Teams. Includes manifest.json, WorkflowBot.cs.
export.consoleDesc: Interactive console chat app. Workflow encrypted, ready to dotnet run.

settings.title: Workflow Settings
settings.typeAutoDesc: Automatically choose strategy based on node types and connections
settings.typeImperativeDesc: Follow graph connections step by step. Supports condition, loop, human, code nodes
settings.typeSequentialDesc: Execute agents in topological order, passing output to next
settings.typeHandoffDesc: Router agent delegates to specialized agents
settings.maxTurnsDesc: Maximum number of agent execution turns before termination
settings.hooksDesc: Configure lifecycle hooks to run code or send webhooks at specific points during workflow execution.
settings.contextPassingDesc: Controls how much context from previous steps is passed to each agent node

form.queryExpansionHint: Auto-generate query variants to improve recall
form.contextCompressionHint: Compress context with LLM when exceeding token budget
form.indexSettingsHint: Changes apply on next file upload
form.httpApiIdHint: Leave empty to use inline URL/Headers above
form.noKeyWarning: No API key configured for this provider

script.promptPlaceholder: Describe what the script should do, e.g. 'Convert JSON to CSV'
script.hint: Use `input` to read previous output. Set `result` for output. Runs in sandbox (no require/import).
script.csharpHint: Parameter `input` is a string. Use `return` to return output. Available: LINQ, JsonSerializer, Regex. No File/Network/Process.
script.noKey: No API key configured. Set up credentials in Settings.

personal.title: Settings
personal.defaultModelDesc: Used by AI Build and new workflow nodes when no provider is specified.
personal.noProviderConfigured: No provider configured. Set up credentials below first.
personal.credentialsDesc: Manage API keys for LLM providers and tools. Keys are stored locally.
personal.budgetDesc: Set spending limits to prevent unexpected costs.
personal.costAlertDesc: Show warning when estimated cost exceeds this amount. 0 = no alert.

dataSource.title: Data Sources
dataSource.description: Manage vector database connections for knowledge bases. Multiple instances per provider supported.
dataSource.empty: No data source connections configured yet.
dataSource.inUse: This data source is used by {{count}} knowledge base(s) and cannot be deleted.

provider.sqliteDesc: Built-in, zero configuration, ideal for personal use
provider.qdrantDesc: High-performance vector database, one Docker command to start

dataSource.goToSettings: Go to Settings to manage connections...

credentials.description: Manage API keys for LLM providers. Keys are encrypted and stored locally.
credentials.noKeyWarning: No API key configured for this provider
credentials.browserModeNotice: Browser mode: Keys are stored in your browser session only and will be cleared when you close this tab.

docRefinery.title: Doc Refinery
docRefinery.uploadArea: Drop files here or click to upload (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, HTML, TXT, Images)
docRefinery.confirmDelete: Delete refinery project "{{name}}"? All files and outputs will be removed.

output.noOutput: No output yet. Configure schema and generate from the Settings tab.

settings.fastDesc: Single LLM call, good for small files
settings.preciseDesc: Multi-layer Agent + Search, better for large/multiple files
settings.challengeDesc: Use a second LLM to verify extraction results (costs ~1.5x tokens)
settings.imageMode_ocr_desc: Extract text from images using Tesseract OCR
settings.imageMode_ai_describe_desc: Use multimodal LLM to describe image content
settings.imageMode_hybrid_desc: OCR first, fallback to AI for low-confidence results
